fields.Name: Write Entity Field(s)
fields.Description: Writes one or more fields onto a SINGLE entity record — either updating an existing record (identified by its PrimaryKey) or creating a new one (when CreateIfMissing=true and no PrimaryKey is supplied). A reusable write primitive for Flow Agents and as the terminal write-back step of a Feature Pipeline: give it the target entity, an optional primary key, and a field map, and it loads-or-creates, sets the fields, and saves. Respects entity validation, permissions, and audit trails (Record Changes). To always insert use Create Record; to read use Get Record / Run View.

fields.Name: EntityName
fields.Description: The MJ entity name as registered in the metadata. Built-in MJ entities all use the 'MJ: ' prefix, e.g. 'MJ: AI Agents', 'MJ: Users', 'MJ: AI Prompt Runs'. Custom entities added by an MJ deployment may or may not use the prefix. Case-insensitive. Look up via Metadata.EntityByName if uncertain.

fields.Name: PrimaryKey
fields.Description: Object identifying an EXISTING record to update, e.g. { "ID": "..." }. Most MJ entities use a single ID field; composite keys are supported via multiple key/value pairs. Accepts a JSON string as well. Omit this to create a new record (requires CreateIfMissing=true).

fields.Name: Fields
fields.Description: Object mapping field names to values, e.g. { "Status": "Active", "Description": "Updated" }. Only writable fields are accepted; primary keys, computed fields, and timestamps (__mj_CreatedAt, __mj_UpdatedAt) are managed automatically and should be omitted. Fields not included are left unchanged on an update. Accepts a JSON string as well.

fields.Name: CreateIfMissing
fields.Description: When true and no PrimaryKey is supplied, a new record is created with the supplied Fields. When false (default), a missing PrimaryKey is a validation error. Defaults to false.

fields.Name: PrimaryKey
fields.Description: Object containing the primary key field(s) and their value(s) for the affected (created or updated) record.

fields.Name: Saved
fields.Description: Boolean flag indicating whether the record was successfully saved.
A required parameter was missing or invalid, or the save failed validation
No existing record was found for the supplied PrimaryKey
Permission denied accessing or saving the record
The record could not be saved (see message for the consolidated entity error)
An unexpected error occurred while writing the record
